problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene may resolve How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
